data.title: Add drift detection step to sprint SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description
Add a drift detection step to the sprint skill SKILL.md between Phase 1 Validate Epic and the Preplanning Gate. This step calls sprint-drift-check.sh and handles the result.

## TDD Requirement
Eval RED test from task 7172-8b9c must be written first. This task makes that eval test pass (GREEN).

## Implementation
Insert a new section in plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md after the "### Validate Epic" section and before "### Preplanning Gate":

### Drift Detection Check

After validating the epic, check for codebase drift before proceeding:

```bash
DRIFT_RESULT=$(.claude/scripts/dso sprint-drift-check.sh <epic-id>)
```

**If DRIFT_DETECTED:**
1. Log: "Codebase drift detected — files modified since task creation: <files>"
2. Record REPLAN_TRIGGER comment on the epic:
   ```bash
   .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "REPLAN_TRIGGER: drift — Files drifted: <files>. Re-invoking implementation-plan for affected stories."
   ```
3. Identify which stories' tasks reference the drifted files (from their file impact sections)
4. For each affected story, re-invoke /dso:implementation-plan via Skill tool (same as Phase 2 Step 2)
5. After all re-invocations complete, record:
   ```bash
   .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "REPLAN_RESOLVED: implementation-plan — Drift re-planning complete for <N> stories."
   ```

**If NO_DRIFT:**
Log: "No codebase drift detected — proceeding to Preplanning Gate." Continue normally.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md contains drift detection step between Validate Epic and Preplanning Gate
  Verify: grep -q 'Drift Detection Check\|sprint-drift-check' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references REPLAN_TRIGGER: drift comment recording
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_TRIGGER: drift' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references REPLAN_RESOLVED comment recording
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_RESOLVED.*implementation-plan' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md is valid markdown with no broken internal references
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Sprint eval drift detection test case passes (GREEN)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
